overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a sunlit forest trail through lush summer vegetation, passing through a small rural camp with canvas tents and wooden structures, then continuing back into the wooded countryside. The scene features bright natural lighting, dense greenery, and vivid wildflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wildflowers and oak trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the sunlit forest, observing the colorful wildflowers and trees

entered.detail: worn dirt trail winding through the forest with visible wheel ruts
tall mature oak trees with dense green canopies lining both sides of the trail
clusters of bright red poppies growing along the path edges
tall purple lupine flowers scattered through the grass
sparse wooden posts marking the trail boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit forest trail surrounded by lush green oak trees and vibrant wildflowers. The path is clear and empty, with wooden fence posts visible on the left side, creating a peaceful summer atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural camp with canvas tents and wooden structures

events.description: enters the village camp area shaded by a massive spreading oak tree
passes the main cluster of tents and approaches the camp exit

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the rural camp, passing between canvas tents and wooden carts under the shade of a large oak

entered.detail: massive ancient oak tree with wide spreading branches creating dappled shade over the path
tan canvas tents set up as temporary shelters, some with open flaps
small wooden structure with a sloped thatched roof and weathered walls
abandoned wooden carts and wagon wheels scattered near the tents
wooden barrels and crates stacked near the hut

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a small rural camp shaded by a massive spreading oak tree. Canvas tents and wooden structures line the dirt path, with abandoned carts and barrels scattered about. The lighting shifts to dappled shade as he passes under the dense tree canopy.

events.description: exits the village camp back into open forest trail with wooden fences

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the village behind and continuing along the forest path now bordered by wooden split-rail fences

entered.detail: rustic split-rail wooden fences lining both sides of the trail
large moss-covered boulders scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the village camp and returns to the open forest trail. Wooden split-rail fences now line both sides of the path, with large forest rocks and dense oak trees visible in the surrounding woods. The bright midday sunlight returns as he leaves the shade of the camp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit forest trail that passes through a shaded rural camp before returning to the open woods. It begins with Geralt walking through a peaceful summer landscape of lush oak trees and vibrant wildflowers, guided by wooden fence posts along a clear path. As he advances, the scene shifts into the dappled shade of a massive spreading oak tree, where the trail becomes a dirt path lined with canvas tents, wooden structures, and scattered barrels. The camera then follows him as he exits the camp, with the lighting transitioning from cool shade back to bright midday sunlight. Finally, the environment opens up once more into the wooded countryside, where split-rail fences and large forest rocks frame the path through the dense greenery.
